record.field: 3411 Silverside Road, Suite 104 Wilmington, DE 19810, USA
3411 Silverside Road, Suite 104, Rodney Building, Wilmington, DE, 19810

[ {"type": "paragraph", "text": "The Client is of the opinion that the Consultant has the necessary qualifications, experience and abilities to provide consulting services to the Client."}, {"type": "paragraph", "text": "The Consultant agrees to provide such consulting services to the Client on the terms and conditions set out in this Agreement."}, {"type": "paragraph", "text": "This Consulting Agreement (hereinafter the \u201cAgreement\u201d) states the terms and conditions that govern the contractual agreement by and between"}, {"type": "paragraph", "text": "{company_name}, a company incorporated and registered in the United States of America whose registered office is at {company_address_flat} (hereinafter the \u201cClient\u201d)"}, {"type": "paragraph", "text": "{employee_name}, with the date of birth {dob}, the holder of Ukrainian Foreign Passport \u2116 {passport_number} issued on {passport_issued} and valid till {passport_expires}, with the primary address of residence {address}"}, {"type": "paragraph", "bold": true, "text": "IN CONSIDERATION OF the matters described above and of the mutual benefits and obligations set forth in this Agreement, the receipt and sufficiency of which consideration is hereby acknowledged, the Client and the Consultant (individually, the \u201cParty\u201d and collectively the \u201cParties\u201d to this Agreement) agree as follows:"} ]
